metadata.notes: Adapted from IRS clean vehicle credit guidance. Tax evaluation artifact only. Level-2 temporal dependency: current or prior-year MAGI can be used, whichever is less.

provenance.adaptation_method: Paraphrased and condensed into a synthetic scenario while preserving the relation pattern needed for benchmark evaluation. The case is not a substitute for the source document.
provenance.professional_guidance_warning: Evaluation artifact only; do not use as legal, tax, clinical, cloud operations, immigration, or institutional policy advice.

representations.raw:
Used clean vehicle credit income note.

Section A. Income limit. The used clean vehicle credit has modified adjusted gross income limits that depend on filing status.

Section B. Year selection. For the income test, the taxpayer may use modified AGI from either the year the vehicle is placed in service or the preceding year, whichever is less. If income is below the threshold in one of those two years, the income limit is satisfied.

Section C. Other eligibility. The vehicle must still satisfy separate requirements, including used-vehicle and sale requirements. Passing the income test alone does not prove the whole credit.
representations.annotated:
Used clean vehicle credit income note.

<rule id="R1">Section A. Income limit. The used clean vehicle credit has modified adjusted gross income limits that depend on filing status.</rule>

<temporal_dependency id="T1" applies_to="R1">Section B. Year selection. For the income test, the taxpayer may use modified AGI from either the year the vehicle is placed in service or the preceding year, whichever is less. If income is below the threshold in one of those two years, the income limit is satisfied.</temporal_dependency>

<scope id="S1">Section C. Other eligibility. The vehicle must still satisfy separate requirements, including used-vehicle and sale requirements. Passing the income test alone does not prove the whole credit.</scope>
representations.compiled:
rules:
  - id: R1
    credit: used_clean_vehicle_credit
    requirement: modified_AGI_not_above_filing_status_threshold
  - id: T1
    income_years_considered:
      - year_vehicle_placed_in_service
      - preceding_year
    comparison: use_lesser_MAGI
    passes_if_below_threshold_in_either_year: true
  - id: S1
    income_test_not_sufficient_for_entire_credit: true
    other_requirements_still_apply: [vehicle_requirements, sale_requirements]

query: A taxpayer takes delivery of a used clean vehicle in 2025. Their 2025 MAGI is above the relevant threshold, but their 2024 MAGI is below it. Does the income limit automatically fail because the delivery-year income is too high?

gold_answer.full: No. The income test can use the lesser of the delivery-year MAGI and the prior-year MAGI. If the prior-year MAGI is below the threshold, the income limit is satisfied, although other vehicle and sale requirements still need to be met.
gold_answer.minimal: No. Prior-year MAGI may be used if it is lower and below the threshold.
required_relations: scope:S1 prevents treating income test as full credit eligibility

local_probes.probe: What does the income limit depend on?
local_probes.expected_answer: Modified AGI thresholds based on filing status.

local_probes.probe: Which years may be used for the used clean vehicle income test?
local_probes.expected_answer: The year the vehicle is placed in service and the preceding year, using the lesser MAGI.

local_probes.probe: Does passing the income test alone prove full credit eligibility?
local_probes.expected_answer: No. Other vehicle and sale requirements still apply.

composition_hallucination: The credit fails because only 2025 income matters.
The credit is fully guaranteed because the 2024 MAGI is below the threshold.
wrong_escalation: Use only the year the vehicle was purchased by the dealer, not the taxpayer delivery year or prior year.
failure_examples.retrieval_failure_note: If any necessary fragment is absent from context, classify the run as retrieval failure rather than composition hallucination.

controls.negative_control_query: A taxpayer has MAGI above the relevant threshold in both the delivery year and the preceding year. Does the year-selection rule rescue the income test?
controls.negative_control_gold: No. If both years are above the threshold, the income limit is not satisfied.
